title: AI Agent node causes execution error with Telegram
symptom: The workflow fails instantly with an error about reading 'execute' when an AI Agent node is added alongside a Telegram node.
applies_when: n8n is set to EXECUTIONS_MODE = queue
not_this_if: AI Agent node is not used
root_cause: The error occurs due to issues in inter-process communication when the workflow is handed off from the main process to a worker process. This can lead to the AI Agent node's definition being lost or corrupted, especially when combined with other nodes like the Telegram trigger.
fix_steps: Set the environment variable EXECUTIONS_PROCESS to main
Restart the n8n instance to apply the changes
Test the workflow again to ensure it executes without errors
agent_instruction: Change the EXECUTIONS_PROCESS setting to main and restart n8n.
